title: The Wobble Whoopsie
premise_summary: Mouse mistakes balloon for a chair.
cover_description: Mouse flattened under a giant green balloon animal shaped like a lumpy seat, paw raised in shock.
script:
[TITLE: The Wobble Whoopsie]
[AGE: 2-5]
[VOICES: high_pitch_cartoon]
[COMEDY_TYPE: physical_escalation]

[SETUP]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: curious, tentative] What’s this squishy thing on the floor? [STING: tiptoe]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: excited] Ooooh! A big green lumpy seat!
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: confident] I’ll just sit right here. Ta-da!
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: suspicious] Wait… why’s it wobbling? [STING: boing]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] Oh no! It’s tipping! [STING: slide_whistle]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: panicked] Wheeeee—plop! [STING: splat]
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: tentative] Okay… maybe I’ll stand on it instead.
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: suspicious] Hmm… still wobbling. [STING: boing]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: panicked] It’s spinning now! [STING: slide_whistle]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: loud] WHOA—BONK! [STING: big_crash]
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: desperate] Fine! I’ll just… poke it with my paw.
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: stunned] It’s… it’s JUMPING! [STING: boing]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: panicked] IT’S CHASING ME! [STING: run]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] I’m tiny. It’s huge. [STING: silence]
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: loud, triumphant] [PUNCHLINE]WAIT—IT’S JUST A GREEN BALLOON ANIMAL![/PUNCHLINE] [STING: victory]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: deflated] …Pop. [STING: deflation]
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: Mouse flattened under a giant green balloon animal shaped like a lumpy seat, paw raised in shock.]
[PREMISE: Mouse mistakes balloon for a chair.]
host_intro: Tonight, Pip finds a very comfortable chair in the park. It is not a chair.
host_outro: Pip is fine. The balloon is not.
